titleStmt.title: SII 15.124: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 124. (B.K. No. 146 of 1926-27.) BELHŌḌ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab set up in front of the temple of Īśvara.
This is dated the 8th regnal year of the king, Jaya, Chaitra śu. 13, Monday, corresponding to 1174 A.D., March 18.

It registers a gift of land and oil-mill to the god Ādityadēva of Beḷupāḍi, for worship and offerings. The earlier portion of the inscription which is much damaged contains praise of the king and his officer Dhannugi-daṇḍanāyaka. This register a gift to the god Mūlasthāna to by the Śeṭṭis and other members of the trading corporation of Five Hundred on the same date. It mentions a Mahāsēnapaṇḍita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē tryeḷōkyanagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti samasta bhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja kāḷāṁjarapuravarādhīśvaraṁ kaḷacu¨rya
cakrava¨rtti rāyamurāri sōyidēva vijeyarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhiprava¨rddhamāna mācaṁdrā¨rkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
pesa¨rvvettaṁ bhūjanaṁ rāgise sale nile vidvajjanaṁ bhītiyiṁ kaṁpisa vārastrījanaṁ vāṁcchise satkula visacchijjanaṁ kū¨rmmeyiṁ va¨rṇnise tāṁ ma¨ryyā
deyiṁ vīradinatisaya savubhāgyediṁ bhāpadiṁ bhāvisalībhūcakradoḷu bijjalanamaḷa yaśaṁ cakranāthāgragaṇya . ko
ḍadinudaysidagastyaṁ kaḍalaṁ pī¨rddante maṁḍalēśvararājyakkoḍeyane puṭṭi bijjala naḍegoṁḍaṁ sā¨rvvabhauma padavīśrīya .
Ā bhujabaḷacakrisuta prabhu sōyidēvanā manōje rāyamurāri yaśōbhari samaṁtu taḷedaṁ
dhareya . bahudaṁḍadoḷu bhūramaṇīmukha doḷusatyavākpāḷana ragadoḷu śrī
ge kuṁbhāgradoḷamaḷayaśōlakṣmīpati cakrādhipa sōyidēva . Ā rāyamurāri pādāṁbōruhasē
citabhramaraṁ vīrāri mathanaśau¨ryanudāraśrī dhanyadaṁḍanāthane negaḷdaṁ nēkadānaguṇi haridēvanāyaka pit® parivāra kalpalate
tāyijagadaṁbike cari mahāsati nijagōtra negaḷdakāśyapagōtravenale satku līnateya
ṇa prastuta surarājya saukhyaṁ nijakaḷāṁbudhi laḷi yādēvi līleyoḷu . tadhai¨ryayu
¨ryyaṁ kritakā¨ryya prakaṭitā dā¨ryanuta sauṁda¨ryya . va . Antu sakaḷadha¨rmma vistāraṇā
karaṇagaḷenisida dhannugidaṁḍanāyaka¨rvveḷuvala duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷaneyiṁ pratiphāḷisuti¨rpa doḷu . dharaṇītaḷado
ḷu nelasida bharatakṣētrade kuṁtaḷāvani negaḷguṁ piridumadaṟoḷa
diṁdadu divyamunīṁdradiṁda budhajanadiṁ tānadu vipravēdeghō sogayisuguṁ . Ā mahānu bhā
vana vaṁśāvatāraventeṁdoḍa . paḍedaṁ sa¨rvvanamasyavāgi diggajaṁ dēśadoḷu nilisidaṁ satkī¨rttiyaṁ vittamaṁ pa
budhakōṭi yoḻu nilisida
yentaṁdoḍe . ḍāmaṇiyeṁbudu gōtra śikhā maṇiyeṁbudu rāya
dēvana vasumatiyoḻu
tiḻigoḻanabjasaṁkuḷa
bhu rāyadēvanī beḷvaladēsa
damaged
mṛgapati sau¨ryya sarasvatti nāmādi
praśasti sahitaṁ khaṁḍasphuṭita¨rjīṇōddhārakkaṁ sthā
nadācā¨ryarāhāradānakkaṁ śrīmatu kaḷacu¨ryya cakrava¨rtti rāyamurāri sōvi dēva va¨rṣada 8 neya jaya saṁvatsara caitra
su 13 sōmavāra saṁkrāntiyalu pū¨rvva cā¨ryya¨rgga
maneya nivēśaṇa
mahāsēnapaṁḍita¨rgge dēvakā¨ryyavaṁ pra
tipāḷisuvaru
ynū¨rvvaranasaṁkhyāte paṁcaśatavīrasāsanalabdhānēka guṇaṁgaḷa satya śau
ca cārucāritranayavinaya vijñāna vīrabaḻaṁju dha¨rmapratipāḷana viśuddha guḍḍadhvaja virājitānūna sāhasāliṁ
gita viśāḻavakṣasthaḷa parākramōṁnatavāsudēvakhaṇḍaḷīmūḷabhadrōdbha va¨rbhbhalluṁkadaṇḍahastarayyāvoḷepuravarēśvara ṣṭa śaṣṭighaṭikāsthāna
yīśvara varaprasādadvādaśa
pa samasta raṁkakāṟaruṁ
birudaruṁ bīravaṇigaruṁ bārika gāvuṁḍugaḷuṁ seṭṭiyaruṁ seṭṭigutta ruṁ pramukha śrīmatu beḷupāḍi
ya śrī mūlasthānadēva¨rggā pratipāḷisuvaru namaśivāyaḥ . © .
svastiśrīmatkaḷacu¨ryya cakrava¨rtti rāyamurāri sōvidēvava¨rṣa 8 neya jaya saṁvatsarada caitra suddha 13 sōmavā
radaṁdu Ādityadēvara nivēdya naṁdādīvige khaṇḍasphuṭita [jī¨rṇnō]ddhārakkaṁ śrīmatu vūroḍeya rāyarasa
maṁmarasa mallikā¨rjjunadēva dhārāpū¨rvvakaṁ māḍi pū¨rvva nibandeyaṟuvaṇa
da matta 4 Ā kayya sīme śrī mūlasthānadēvara keyyiṁ paḍuva kammaṟageyi baḍaga ku
ṟuguṇigeyiṁda mūḍa Ā dēvariṁ paḍuvalu śrī ḍēsvarada śrī mūlasthāna dēvara sa[¨rvva] namaśyada gāṇa 1 ©
śrī mūlasthānadēvarādityadēvarācā¨ryya
Digital edition of SII 15.124 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
